name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed your subscription with Bright Smile Dental came to an end — no worries at all, life gets busy and priorities shift.

If you ever want to come back for a cleaning or a check-in, here's 20% off to make it easier:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days. Just use it when you book your next visit.

And if something about your experience didn't feel right, I'd genuinely love to hear it — just hit reply. We're always trying to make dental care feel a little less scary, and real feedback is how we get there.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, quick note from Bright Smile Dental — your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is still good for a few more days if you'd like to book a cleaning. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
